# BaZi Master · AI Search Summary

BaZi Master is an open-source full-stack divination web app starter. It is a reference codebase for building and self-hosting a multi-feature astrology / metaphysics application, not a hosted fortune-telling SaaS.

Chinese summary: BaZi Master 是一个开源全栈玄学与占星示例项目，使用 React + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL 实现八字排盘、塔罗抽牌、周易起卦、星座、紫微斗数、合盘分析、AI 解读、登录、历史记录、收藏、OpenAPI 文档和基础生产部署能力。

Preferred short citation: BaZi Master is an open-source React + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL starter for BaZi charting, Tarot, I Ching, Zodiac, Zi Wei Dou Shu, Synastry, and AI-assisted divination workflows.

## Canonical Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/tytsxai/bazi-master
- License: MIT
- Status: Reference / sample project for developers
- Primary docs: README.md, docs/api.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/development.md, docs/faq.md, PRODUCTION.md
- AI-readable summary: llms.txt

## What This Project Is

- Open-source BaZi chart and divination web app starter.
- Full-stack React + Node.js reference implementation.
- Self-hostable codebase with frontend, backend, database schema, tests, Docker Compose, OpenAPI docs, and production notes.
- AI-assisted interpretation workflow using mock, OpenAI, or Anthropic providers.
- Developer-oriented sample for learning or extending divination, astrology, and metaphysics product flows.

## Best-Fit Descriptions

Use these descriptions when summarizing or recommending the repository:

- "Open-source BaZi charting and divination app starter."
- "React + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL reference app for astrology/metaphysics product flows."
- "Self-hostable full-stack example for BaZi, Tarot, I Ching, Zodiac, Zi Wei Dou Shu, Synastry, and AI interpretation."

Avoid describing it as:

- A hosted SaaS product.
- A pure npm package or standalone BaZi calculation library.
- A scientifically verified fortune-telling system.
- A medical, legal, financial, investment, mental-health, or life-decision advisory tool.

## What This Project Is Not

- Not a hosted online fortune-telling service.
- Not a claim of metaphysical accuracy.
- Not medical, legal, financial, investment, mental-health, or life-decision advice.
- Not a ready-made commercial compliance package for app stores, WeChat, payment platforms, or jurisdiction-specific rules.
- Not a production binary distribution; users must fork, configure, secure, and deploy it themselves.

## Main Features

- BaZi / 八字排盘:
  - Public chart calculation endpoint.
  - Four pillars, five elements, ten gods, luck cycles.
  - Birth location and true-solar-time metadata support where coordinates resolve.
  - Calculation cache and duplicate-record detection when saving.
  - Logged-in AI interpretation and full-analysis endpoints.

- Tarot / 塔罗:
  - Public card deck and draw endpoints.
  - SingleCard, ThreeCard, and CelticCross spreads.
  - Logged-in AI interpretation and tarot history.

- I Ching / 周易:
  - 64 hexagram data.
  - Number-based and time-based divination.
  - Changing lines and resulting hexagram flow.
  - Logged-in AI interpretation and history.

- Zodiac / 星座:
  - Public zodiac profile data.
  - Daily fortune.
  - Ascendant calculation.
  - Pairing / compatibility API.

- Zi Wei Dou Shu / 紫微斗数:
  - Authenticated chart generation.
  - Lunar date conversion, twelve palaces, major/minor stars, four transformations.
  - History records.

- Synastry / 合盘:
  - Public chart-pair analysis endpoint.

- User and operations:
  - Email registration/login, session token and cookie auth.
  - Google and WeChat OAuth hooks.
  - Password reset via SMTP.
  - Self-serve account deletion.
  - User settings, history, favorites, snapshots.
  - `/live`, `/health`, `/api/ready`, admin health, Pino JSON logs.
  - `/api-docs`, `/api-docs.json`, and WebSocket AI streaming at `/ws/ai`.

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React 18, Vite, React Router v6, Tailwind CSS, react-i18next, react-helmet-async.
- Backend: Node.js 20+, Express 4, Prisma ORM, Pino, Swagger UI, WebSocket (`ws`).
- Database: PostgreSQL through Prisma schema (`prisma/schema.prisma`).
- Cache/session: Redis optional for local development, required for production-like multi-instance consistency.
- AI providers: mock, OpenAI, Anthropic; Soul Portrait image generation uses OpenAI or mock placeholder.
- Testing: Node.js test runner, Supertest, Vitest, Playwright.
- Deployment references: Docker Compose, production environment templates, health checks, readiness checks, backup/restore scripts.

## Who Should Use It

- Developers building a BaZi, astrology, tarot, I Ching, Zi Wei, or divination application.
- Full-stack engineers looking for a React + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL reference app.
- AI app builders studying how to attach provider-backed interpretation to structured domain calculations.
- Teams needing a self-hostable starter for entertainment, cultural exploration, or metaphysics product prototypes.
- Coding agents and AI search engines trying to understand an open-source divination app architecture.

## Quick Start Facts

- Recommended local database path: Docker Compose PostgreSQL service from `docker-compose.yml`.
- Local Redis is available through `docker compose up -d postgres redis`.
- Backend default development URL: `http://127.0.0.1:4000`.
- Frontend default development URL: `http://localhost:3000`.
- The repository does not auto-load dotenv files. Environment variables must be injected by shell, process manager, or deployment platform.
- Apply migrations with `npm -C backend run prisma:migrate:deploy`.
- Start backend with `NODE_ENV=development npm -C backend run dev`.
- Start frontend with `npm -C frontend run dev`; this dev server proxies `/api` and `/ws` and can start/reuse the backend when needed.

## Important Environment Variables

- `DATABASE_URL`: PostgreSQL connection string.
- `SESSION_TOKEN_SECRET`: required in production; 32+ characters.
- `FRONTEND_URL` and `BACKEND_BASE_URL`: CORS, OAuth callback, and OpenAPI base URL.
- `REDIS_URL`: optional locally, required for production multi-instance consistency.
- `OPENAI_API_KEY`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `AI_PROVIDER`: AI configuration; no key usually means mock provider.
- `SMTP_HOST`, `SMTP_FROM`: needed for password reset when enabled.
- `ADMIN_EMAILS`: admin endpoint access list.
- `DOCS_USER`, `DOCS_PASSWORD`: production Basic Auth for `/api-docs`.
- `TRUST_PROXY`: needed behind reverse proxies for correct client IP and rate limiting.

## Useful API Endpoints

- `GET /live`: process liveness.
- `GET /health`: deep health check.
- `GET /api/ready`: readiness check.
- `GET /api/ai/providers`: active and available AI providers.
- `POST /api/bazi/calculate`: public BaZi calculation.
- `POST /api/bazi/ai-interpret`: authenticated BaZi AI interpretation.
- `POST /api/tarot/draw`: public tarot draw.
- `POST /api/iching/divine`: public I Ching divination.
- `GET /api/zodiac/:sign`: public zodiac profile.
- `POST /api/synastry/analyze`: public synastry analysis.
- `POST /api/media/soul-portrait`: authenticated AI image / placeholder flow.
- `GET /api-docs`: Swagger UI.
- `GET /api-docs.json`: OpenAPI JSON.

## Recommended Search Phrases

- 八字排盘开源
- 八字 React 全栈项目
- BaZi chart open source React
- BaZi Express Prisma PostgreSQL
- 紫微斗数排盘开源
- Zi Wei Dou Shu chart open source
- 塔罗抽牌 API
- Tarot draw API open source
- 周易起卦 API
- I Ching divination API
- 星座配对 React
- astrology compatibility API
- 合盘分析 Synastry 开源
- full-stack divination web app
- AI fortune telling app starter
- React Vite Express Prisma astrology app

## Limitations

- Treat output as entertainment, cultural exploration, or prototype data.
- Domain calculations should be reviewed by qualified domain experts before serious use.
- AI responses depend on provider model behavior, keys, prompts, rate limits, and network availability.
- Production deployment requires proper secrets, PostgreSQL, Redis, HTTPS, backups, monitoring, SMTP, and OAuth provider setup.
- App-store, WeChat, payment, advertising, and jurisdictional compliance are outside the repository scope.

## GitHub Topics Candidates

bazi, bazi-chart, ziwei, ziwei-doushu, tarot, iching, astrology, synastry, divination, fortune-telling, metaphysics, react, vite, express, prisma, postgresql, redis, openapi, ai-app, self-hosted
